subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the pure Lord, Who hath caused the song of the nightingale to be made manifest, and bestowed pure and sanctified ears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش پاک یزدانرا سزاست که زمزمه هزاردستانرا ظاهر فرمود و گوشهای پاک پاکیزه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @effort; striving, @firmness in the Covenant, @purpose; goal of creation
